curation.synopsis: Newly posted Commissar Bastun Hasp regards the Savlar Chem-Dogs, a penal legion of addicts, criminals, and castoffs, as mongrels whose worthless lives gain value only when spent in the Emperor's wars. Ordered to lead a kill-team of these unruly soldiers deep into enemy territory, Hasp must wring vital intelligence out of a former Imperial bastion now held by the orks that sacked it. Survival means weathering a doomed counter-offensive against a green tide, assuming the Chem-Dogs do not murder their disdainful new commissar first. A brutal, blackly comic tale of discipline, contempt, and the thin line between a leader and the men he leads.

flags.reason: the bastion world is not clearly named in available sources
